mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bike_station_status (number, last_update, available_bikes, available_bike_stands, status) VALUES (#{number}, #{lastUpdate}, #{availableBikes}, #{availableBikeStands}, #{status})

INSERT INTO bike_station_status (number, last_update, available_bikes, available_bike_stands, status) VALUES
(#{item.number}, #{item.lastUpdate}, #{item.availableBikes}, #{item.availableBikeStands}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, number, last_update, available_bikes, available_bike_stands, status FROM bike_station_status WHERE number = #{number} ORDER BY last_update DESC
SELECT id, number, last_update, available_bikes, available_bike_stands, status FROM bike_station_status WHERE number = #{number} ORDER BY last_update DESC LIMIT 1
